name: firebase-remote-config-admin
title: Firebase - Remote Config
description: Inspect, compare, edit, publish, delete, and roll back Firebase Remote Config across multiple projects
author: danilorequena

commands.name: remote-config-admin
commands.title: Browse Remote Config
commands.description: Inspect parameters and conditions across multiple Firebase projects

commands.name: manage-projects
commands.title: Manage Projects
commands.description: Manage saved Firebase projects and project groups

commands.name: bulk-operations
commands.title: Bulk Operations
commands.description: Preview and publish parameter or condition changes across projects

commands.name: remote-config-versions
commands.title: Versions & Rollback
commands.description: List published versions and roll back a project template

commands.name: export-defaults
commands.title: Export Defaults
commands.description: Download Remote Config defaults for a project

preferences.name: sharedCredentialRef
preferences.title: Shared Service Account JSON Path
preferences.description: Optional fallback path to a Firebase service account JSON file used by projects without a credentialRef

preferences.name: requestTimeoutMs
preferences.title: Request Timeout (ms)
preferences.description: HTTP timeout for Firebase API requests

tools.name: list-projects
tools.title: List Firebase Projects
tools.description: List saved Firebase Remote Config projects and saved project groups

tools.name: get-project-remote-config
tools.title: Get Project Remote Config
tools.description: Fetch one Firebase Remote Config template and summarize parameters, conditions, and versions

tools.name: find-parameter-across-projects
tools.title: Find Parameter Across Projects
tools.description: Compare a Remote Config parameter across selected Firebase projects

tools.name: find-condition-across-projects
tools.title: Find Condition Across Projects
tools.description: Compare a Remote Config condition across selected Firebase projects

tools.name: summarize-flag-state-across-projects
tools.title: Summarize Flag State Across Projects
tools.description: Summarize whether a feature flag is enabled across selected Firebase projects

tools.name: search-parameters
tools.title: Search Parameters
tools.description: Search Remote Config parameters by partial key name across selected Firebase projects

tools.name: upsert-parameter
tools.title: Create or Update Parameter
tools.description: Create or update a Remote Config parameter across selected Firebase projects

tools.name: delete-parameter
tools.title: Delete Parameter
tools.description: Delete a Remote Config parameter across selected Firebase projects

tools.name: upsert-condition
tools.title: Create or Update Condition
tools.description: Create or update a Remote Config condition across selected Firebase projects

tools.name: delete-condition
tools.title: Delete Condition
tools.description: Delete a Remote Config condition across selected Firebase projects
